name: Jabba the Hutt
bannerMiniatureIdeas: Ornate Hutt throne dais with golden goblet, chain links, and a tiny frozen Han carbonite plaque
Rancor pit gate totem with bone pile, iron grate, and flickering torch sconces
Holoprojector pedestal displaying Jabba's calling card with surrounding palace coin offerings
vehicleSuggestions: Desert skiff (iconic Tatooine transport from the Sarlacc sequence)
Escort skiff (paired guard skiff for palace processions)

factionTrait.name: Marauders Champion
factionTrait.text: A marauder moves the turn token +1 step when they knock out an enemy follower.

uniqueTraits.name: Hutt's Entourage
uniqueTraits.text: When Gamorrean Guards make a recruit action during Jabba the Hutt's activation, you may place the new Gamorrean Guard adjacent to any Gamorrean Guard placed during this activation.

ultimate.name: The Sarlacc Pit
ultimate.text: This skill may target up to three followers on any hexes within range.

plotSkills.name: Palace Reinforcements
plotSkills.text: Remove all Gamorrean Guards from the battlefield. Then they make five recruit actions.

plotSkills.name: Rancor Breath
plotSkills.text: This skill targets each enemy champion and follower unit adjacent to one or more Gamorrean Guards. Hit Effect: Inflict {damage_die_blight}.

plotSkills.name: Gamorrean Shackles
plotSkills.text: This skill targets each enemy champion and follower unit adjacent to one or more Gamorrean Guards. Hit Effect: Inflict {move_blight}.

clashSkills.name: Sail Barge Procession
clashSkills.text: Jabba the Hutt moves up to 3 hexes in a straight line.

clashSkills.name: Palace Reinforcements
clashSkills.text: Remove all Gamorrean Guards from the battlefield. Then they make five recruit actions.

traits.name: Expendable Guards
traits.text: When a Gamorrean Guard is knocked out, it is worth 0 steps instead of 1.

plotSkills.name: Guard Rush
plotSkills.text: Gain {move_boon}. Two Gamorrean Guards may use this skill in the same activation if they are in different hexes.

clashSkills.name: Gamorrean Beatdown
clashSkills.text: This skill may target up to three models in one hex. Two Gamorrean Guards may use this skill in the same activation if they are in different hexes.
